workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Can you extract the deployment blockers from this exec meeting notes for Humongous Insurance? This is a renewal account with declining consumption.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-24 09:31 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Humongous Insurance

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
Date: 2024-02-04 12:06 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-11 08:14 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with deployment blockers. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Humongous Insurance: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-N failure mode (Draft-only default delays response on simple acknowledgments)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence
